_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Present technical information to technical and non-technical audiences.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.635), AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.563).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.677). Shared vocabulary: [audiences, non, technical]. DCWF-only terms [information, present] vs WIDAI-only terms [briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats, internal] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.915 (P=0.946, R=0.886). P exceeds R by 0.060 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Present technical information to technical and non-technical audiences." and "Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical aud" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.644 ≈ STS 0.677 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [audiences, non, technical] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 23.8%. Shared tokens: [audiences, non, technical]. DCWF-only: [information, present]. WIDAI-only: [briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats, internal].
